name: Cherry-Apple Crumble
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Fresh or frozen (thawed) unsweetened dark cherries, pitted
2 tablespoons Butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Spray a 8x8 inch square pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix the cherries, apples, raisins, and 1 tablespoon of the flour.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. In another bowl, cut the butter/margarine into small pieces and combine it with the remaining flour, honey, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Use a pastry blender to mix until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
6. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the fruit mixture.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until the topping is light brown.
8. Serve warm or chilled.
